title: Special Ops Armour and Inventory Detector
description: Adds ARAS armour into the game. And a Inventory Detector that outputs item into a chest facing the X axis.
body:
![ARAS armour](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0f5244a646444fc1658aad9f0cbded481b735431.png)
-
I am not planning to update, add new features. I have lost the source code. - 2025 June 26th
-

Adds ARAS armour that is the Lithuanians special force armour. And adds a brand new block the Inventory Xray that copies (dupes) the items from the players inventory into a bellow existing double chest. (The items will only be outputed in the X axis, refer to the image). Great for prison RP servers.
![The XRAY](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c82ff4ffc55d3d38bc655f13e1632326cd6171f6.png)
